summary: W829 keeps the target nonterminal under the immutable original four-task contract and adds a left-calculus stable route for BoundedDerivedInfinityCategory over MetrizableLCA. Direct bounded left calculus now conditionally supplies preadditivity, zero object, all-shift additivity, and suspension additivity; the route still lacks the left-calculus premise itself, finite limits, finite colimits, pretriangulated structure, triangulated structure, and an original four-task completion witness.

The review packet does not yet contain the immutable-contract negative fixtures and clean extraction audit required for completion.
